'''jafata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibn|ibn]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-f-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibn|ibn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jafata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæfætæth|jæfætæth]] || [[word:jæfætæj|jæfætæj]] || [[word:jæfætæsh|jæfætæsh]] || [[word:jæfætæ|jæfætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jafafatath|jafafatath]] || [[word:jafafataj|jafafataj]] || [[word:jafafatash|jafafatash]] || [[word:jafafata|jafafata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jafatath|jafatath]] || [[word:jafataj|jafataj]] || [[word:jafatash|jafatash]] || [[word:jafata|jafata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jafaftath|jafaftath]] || [[word:jafaftaj|jafaftaj]] || [[word:jafaftash|jafaftash]] || [[word:jafaftaf|jafaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jafatatha|jafatatha]] || [[word:jafataja|jafataja]] || [[word:jafatasha|jafatasha]] || [[word:jafataka|jafataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jafatath|jafatath]] || [[word:jafataj|jafataj]] || [[word:jafatash|jafatash]] || [[word:jafata|jafata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jafatathal|jafatathal]] || [[word:jafatajal|jafatajal]] || [[word:jafatashal|jafatashal]] || [[word:jafatakal|jafatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jafatathatha|jafatathatha]] || [[word:jafatajaja|jafatajaja]] || [[word:jafatashasha|jafatashasha]] || [[word:jafataka|jafataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jafatathan|jafatathan]] || [[word:jafatajan|jafatajan]] || [[word:jafatashan|jafatashan]] || [[word:jafatakan|jafatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jafatathaoro|jafatathaoro]] || [[word:jafatajaoro|jafatajaoro]] || [[word:jafatashaoro|jafatashaoro]] || [[word:jafatakaoro|jafatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
